Indicator.title: Indicator
Indicator.description: Represents a single Indikator Kinerja Utama (IKU) / KPI for Poltekkes Kemenkes Palembang 2026

no.description: The sequential number of the indicator

kode.description: The unique code of the indicator (e.g. IKM 17.3.1)

formulaPerhitungan.description: The formula used to calculate this indicator

dataDibutuhkan.description: List of variables or input values needed for calculations

satuan.description: The unit of measurement (e.g. %, orang, dokumen)

pj.description: The Penanggung Jawab unit (e.g. Alumni dan Kerjasama, Keuangan)

pjWadir.description: The supervising Vice Director (Wadir 1, Wadir 2, Wadir 3)

quarters.description: Data entries for each quarter (TW I, TW II, TW III, TW IV)

SpiNote.title: SpiNote
SpiNote.description: Catatan Verifikasi dari Satuan Pengawas Internal (SPI) Poltekkes Palembang

updatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the note was updated

updatedBy.description: The email of the verifier who updated the note

/indicators/{indicatorId}.description: Collection of all Poltekkes Performance Indicators

/spi_notes/{noteId}.description: Collection of all SPI Verification Notes
